stories.headline: EU Parliament Passes Landmark AI Act
stories.summary: The European Parliament approved the comprehensive AI Act, establishing strict rules for AI development and deployment. This landmark legislation aims to protect fundamental rights and set a global precedent.

stories.headline: Quantum Computing Breakthrough Announced by Tech Giant
stories.summary: A major tech company revealed a significant leap in quantum computing, potentially revolutionizing drug development and material science with unprecedented processing power.

stories.headline: UN Warns of Worsening Famine in East Africa
stories.summary: UN agencies issued an urgent appeal for aid as famine conditions intensify across East Africa due to severe drought and ongoing conflicts, threatening millions of lives.

stories.headline: Global Markets React to Inflation Data, Central Banks Cautious
stories.summary: New inflation figures have prompted varied reactions in global markets, with major central banks reiterating a cautious stance on future interest rate decisions.

stories.headline: New Broad-Spectrum Antiviral Drug Shows Promising Results
stories.summary: Scientists announced successful Phase 3 trials for a novel broad-spectrum antiviral drug, potentially offering a crucial tool against future viral outbreaks and emerging threats.
